name: Agent Workbench
description: Local-first MCP runtime that gives coding agents bounded repository status, context, diagnostics, documentation, graph query, edit preview/apply, and validation-planning surfaces.

privacy.notes: Agent Workbench reads local repository evidence and returns bounded MCP responses. It does not send repository data to a hosted service.

resources.name: status
resources.description: Compact repository status, freshness, scope, and adapter coverage.
resources.budget_policy: Scans bounded repository file catalog evidence; no source mutation.

resources.name: scope
resources.description: Indexed roots, skipped roots, language counts, capability counts, and generated/vendor scope.
resources.budget_policy: Scans bounded repository file catalog evidence; no source mutation.

resources.name: overview
resources.description: Compact repository overview with platforms, key files, docs, validation hints, and first-call guidance.
resources.budget_policy: Scans bounded repository file catalog and docs evidence; no source mutation.

resources.name: docs-overview
resources.description: Compact docs overview with important docs, headings, warnings, truncation, and direct-read caveats.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_docs, and max_headings_per_doc; scans Markdown docs without source mutation.

resources.name: docs-map
resources.description: Bounded repository documentation map with paths, headings, warnings, truncation, and direct-read caveats.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_docs, and max_headings_per_doc; scans Markdown docs without source mutation.

resources.name: codex-integration-profile
resources.description: Codex feature, plugin, skill, hook, and update-path profile.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded static integration profile metadata; no repository scan.

resources.name: integration-health
resources.description: Compact Agent Workbench MCP integration health with configured, registered, discovered, and callable states.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded registry/profile/session metadata; no tool execution and no source mutation.

tools.name: context_for_task
tools.description: Gather compact task context from local repository evidence before editing.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_files and max_docs; scans local file catalog only.

tools.name: diagnostics_for_files
tools.description: Run compact provider-backed diagnostics for repo-relative files without executing validation commands.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_files and provider budgets; never mutates files or executes validation commands.

tools.name: docs_scope
tools.description: Set, clear, or show the default docs scope_path for this MCP server session.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded in-memory MCP session state only; no repository scan and no source mutation.

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search repository docs by path, title, heading, and bounded text snippets.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_results, and snippet limits; scans Markdown docs without source mutation.

tools.name: docs_outline
tools.description: Read a bounded heading outline for one repo-relative Markdown document.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded heading outline for one Markdown document; reads no generated/vendor paths.

tools.name: docs_read_section
tools.description: Read one bounded Markdown section by repo-relative path and stable heading identifier.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_bytes for one Markdown section; reads no generated/vendor paths.

tools.name: check_markdown_document
tools.description: Check one Markdown document for parser-aware structure, frontmatter, link, list, and table quality findings.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by one repo-relative Markdown document, max_file_bytes, max_findings, and evidence byte limits.

tools.name: check_markdown_set
tools.description: Check a bounded explicit or scoped set of Markdown documents for quality findings.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by explicit paths or scope_path plus max_documents, max_findings, file-size, and evidence limits.

tools.name: symbol_search
tools.description: Search indexed graph symbols with bounded row and optional source-byte budgets.

tools.name: find_references
tools.description: Find resolved and unresolved references for an indexed graph node or exact symbol.

tools.name: impact
tools.description: Compute bounded graph impact for an indexed symbol without broad source scans.

tools.name: preview_workspace_edit
tools.description: Preview bounded workspace edits and return a token without mutating files.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded to 20 full-file replacement edits and token TTL <= 1 hour; preview does not mutate files.

tools.name: apply_workspace_edit
tools.description: Apply a previously previewed bounded workspace edit after hash and safety checks.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded to 20 full-file replacement edits and requires a matching preview token.

tools.name: verification_plan
tools.description: Plan validation commands and quiet static feedback without executing commands.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_commands; never executes validation commands.
